criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for personalized recommendations, chatbots, and other AI-powered features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and navigability of the app.

criteria.name: Product Variety
criteria.description: Range and variety of products available on the app.

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support services.

criteria.name: Secure Transactions
criteria.description: Security measures in place for safe transactions.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
